name: kbridge-geneva-20-animate
description: Coverage-campaign showcase: geneva_20 is the campaign's poster child - it arrived with 3 dropped joints and could not assemble. F1 synthesized the CrankAss sub-assembly's children (Shaft1, Crank - occurrence records absent from the table, recovered from keyframe-0) and welded them rigid; F2 classified the UnknownJointType crank pivot as a revolute from its recorded motion (72 deg single-axis rotation) and that joint is now the EMITTED DRIVER; B-bug-014 gave every weld frame orientation so the assembly converges in 0 iters. Sweep drives joint_5 0->72 deg, 35/35 steps, no overrides. Pass/fail = Converged + SlopSuccess. doc=MM, CPig-only. Slop: KinematicBridge/out/_slop-side-by-side/geneva-20-bind-sweep-animate.canary.slop.json.

setup.vlmDescription: A Geneva indexing mechanism as shaded solid CAD parts: a crank assembly (shaft + crank arm) posed mid-rotation by the solver, two meshing gears, a slotted Geneva disk, on base brackets, overlaid with a CPig frame-triad skeleton, at a sane scale.

checkpoints.name: persp
checkpoints.description: geneva_20 posed mid-sweep by CPig's solve of the F2-recovered driver; the synthesized Shaft1+Crank ride their B-bug-014 welds.
